title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
